allow: Bash(powershell -Command "docker exec ai-api-1 sh -c ''sqlite3 /app/rental.db ""SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM customers""''")
Bash(powershell -Command "docker exec ai-api-1 python -c ''import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(""/app/rental.db""\); print\(conn.execute\(""SELECT * FROM customers""\).fetchall\(\)\)''")
Bash(powershell -Command "docker exec ai-api-1 python -c ""import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\(''/app/rental.db''\); print\(c.execute\(''SELECT * FROM customers''\).fetchall\(\)\)""")
